footnotes.text: The term "sister," like "brother," was used in a wide sense. Cf. note on 3, 31. The son of Mary: designates the only son of a widow.
The Apostles were to go forth without ordinary provisions, relying upon Providence and the hospitality of their countrymen.
Jesus' activity had aroused intense speculation as to His identity.
Was unwilling to displease her: the Greek text probably means, "would not break faith with her."
Recognized them: the words can also mean, "realized where they were going."
